name: Feature request
about: Propose a new ACI capability or contract improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Need

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Boundaries

Does this belong in generic ACI, an optional domain pack, or downstream integration?

## Evidence

List sample files, report gaps, or tool behavior that motivated this request.
